title: [codereview-pass1-chunk1] coap_dtn.c:20 deaddrop_post duplicates OSCORE option extraction, PIV parsing, and payload retrieval logic that is now encapsulated in coap_oscore_unprotect_request (coap_oscore.c:99-142). Violates DRY and LCI spec 17.5 OSCORE requirement for consistent protection. P1 correctness.
